videos.title: 30 is not the new 20 — here’s what you should do right now #TEDTalks

videos.description: Clinical psychologist Meg Jay has a bold message for twentysomethings: Contrary to popular belief, your 20s are not a throwaway decade. videos.title: How Screens Stole Childhood — and How to Get It Back | Jonathan Haidt | TED
videos.author: TED
videos.description: Humans aren't just social — we're ultrasocial, wired like bees and ants for deep connection. So what happens when smartphones take over childhood, tablets replace textbooks and AI companies infiltrate our kids’ lives?
